Hero.title: Seedance 2.0
Hero.description: Experience true multi-modal AI video creation. Combine images, videos, audio, and text to generate cinematic content with precise reference capabilities, seamless video extension, and natural language control.

Features.description: From basic stability to complex multi-modal references, experience the next evolution in AI video generation.

items.title: Enhanced Basic Capabilities
items.description: More stable, smoother, and realistic. Better physical laws, natural movement, precise instruction following, and stable style retention.

items.title: Multi-Modal & Free Combination
items.description: Supports text, image, video, and audio inputs. Combine reference objects freely (up to 9 images, 3 videos, 3 audio files).

items.title: Superior Consistency
items.description: Solves common issues like face shifting, detail loss, or scene jumping. Maintains character, clothing, and item details throughout the video.

items.title: Precise Camera & Motion Copy
items.description: Replicate Hollywood-grade camera movements (dolly, pan, zoom) and complex character actions just by uploading a reference video.

items.title: Creative Effects & Templates
items.description: Replicate transitions, advertising templates, and complex editing effects. Model identifies visual structure and rhythm from reference videos.

items.title: Storytelling & Plot Completion
items.description: Interpret comic strips or storyboards in order. Generate videos that follow a narrative sequence with consistent characters.

items.title: Video Extension
items.description: Smoothly extend videos (forward or backward). Create longer sequences while maintaining the original style and flow.

items.title: Audio Generation & Voice
items.description: Improved sound realism and accuracy. Generate matching sound effects, Dubbing, and atmospheric music.

items.title: Consistent Long Shot (One Shot)
items.description: Generate 'One Shot' continuous videos without cuts, maintaining visual logic and stability across a longer timeframe.

items.title: Video Editing
items.description: Modify specific parts of an existing video (e.g., change a character, extend a clip) without regenerating the entire sequence.

items.title: Music Rhythm Sync
items.description: Card point capability. Generate video edits that sync closely with the rhythm and beats of uploaded music.

items.title: Emotional Expression
items.description: Rich emotional performance. Characters can transition between emotions (e.g., calm to collapse) realistically.

UseCases.description: From viral content to professional productions, Seedance 2.0 empowers creators across industries to bring their multi-modal visions to life.

items.title: Advertising & Marketing
items.description: Create compelling promotional content by referencing successful ad templates. Replicate proven creative formats with your own products and branding.

items.title: Education & Training
items.description: Bring lessons to life with engaging visual content. Create animated explanations, historical reconstructions, and interactive learning materials.

items.title: Creative Storytelling
items.description: Craft unique narratives using multi-modal inputs. Reference film techniques, replicate cinematic styles, and extend your story across seamless scenes.

items.title: Social Media Content
items.description: Generate scroll-stopping content by referencing trending templates and effects. Replicate viral formats with your own creative twist.

items.title: Motion & Dance Videos
items.description: Upload reference choreography or motion clips and apply them to any character. Perfect for dance covers, motion replication, and action sequences.

items.title: Video Editing & Extension
items.description: Extend existing videos, merge multiple clips, or edit specific segments without regenerating everything from scratch.

items.title: Film Pre-Visualization
items.description: Reference film clips to replicate camera movements, transitions, and visual effects. Test cinematography before production.

items.title: Real Estate & Architecture
items.description: Transform property photos into immersive virtual tours. Showcase architectural designs with dynamic walkthroughs and atmospheric presentations.

items.title: Music & Audio Sync
items.description: Upload audio tracks and create beat-synced videos. Generate sound effects and background music that match your visual content.

HowItWorks.titlePrefix: How to Create AI Videos with

items.title: Upload Your Assets
items.description: Upload images, videos, or audio files as references. You can combine up to 12 files across different modalities to express your vision.

items.title: Describe Your Vision
items.description: Use natural language to describe what you want. Reference specific assets by tagging them, like 'Use @image1 as the first frame with @video1's camera movement.'

items.title: Generate & Iterate
items.description: Generate your video in 4-15 seconds length. Extend, edit, or refine your creation by uploading the result and making targeted adjustments.

FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about Seedance 2.0 and how to get started.

items.question: What inputs does Seedance 2.0 support?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 supports four input modalities: up to 9 images, up to 3 videos (total duration ≤15s), up to 3 audio files (MP3, total duration ≤15s), and text prompts in natural language. You can combine up to 12 files total across different modalities for maximum creative flexibility.

items.question: What can I reference with Seedance 2.0?
items.answer: You can reference virtually anything from your uploaded content: motion and choreography, visual effects and transitions, camera movements and angles, character appearances and styles, scene compositions, and even audio/sound. Simply describe in your prompt what you want to reference, like 'Use the camera movement from @video1 with the character style from @image1.'

items.question: How does video extension work?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 can smoothly extend existing videos. Upload your video and specify how many seconds you want to add (the generation length should match your extension length, e.g., extend 5s with 5s generation). The model maintains continuity in motion, style, and content for seamless results.

items.question: Can I edit existing videos with Seedance 2.0?
items.answer: Yes! Seedance 2.0 supports video editing capabilities. You can replace characters, modify specific actions or segments, add new elements, or remove unwanted content - all while preserving the rest of your video. This means you can make targeted adjustments without regenerating everything from scratch.

items.question: How does the audio feature work?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 includes built-in audio generation that creates context-aware sound effects and background music. You can also upload your own audio files to sync video content to specific beats or rhythms, perfect for music videos and dance content.

items.question: What video lengths and resolutions are supported?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 generates videos from 4 to 15 seconds in length. Multiple aspect ratios are supported including 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 21:9, and 1:1. The model supports various resolutions up to 1080p for production-ready output.

items.question: How is character consistency maintained?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 features significantly improved consistency for faces, clothing, and styles. By referencing character images, the model can maintain identity across longer videos and complex movements.

items.question: How can I upgrade my subscription?
items.answer: Our system currently allows only one active subscription at a time. Please cancel your current plan in Dashboard > Subscription first, then subscribe to the new plan. If you need help, email support@sdanceai.com.

items.question: How can I purchase more credits?
items.answer: There are several ways to get additional credits: Purchase our one-time payment packages to get credits instantly, or upgrade your subscription plan.

items.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time in Dashboard > Subscription via the billing portal (Stripe or Creem). If needed, contact support@sdanceai.com.

items.question: Are there any content restrictions?
items.answer: Yes. Due to compliance requirements, we do not support uploading realistic real human faces (images or videos). Uploading such content will be blocked for safety reasons.
